name: Rectangular Tiling with One Hole per Row and Column (IMO6)

N.description: Size of the grid (number of rows and columns)

notes: EvoCut arXiv submission `v1` proposes a family of six inequalities used to generate formulations `p7.b-g`.
EvoCut arXiv submission `v2` proposes two inequalities used to generate formulations `p7.h-i`.
